text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Today's weight training workout is... complete.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hm, what time is it now?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Huh... It appears I finished much earlier than
expected...
choice_data_list: You're actually a little behind schedule...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I appear to have confused the big hand with the little hand on the clock. How embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be exhausted if she's managed to
misread the clock. I should rethink her race
schedule.
